description.value:
Honor is the pillar of traditional dwarven ideals. When someone @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Lie]{Lies} to you, you automatically roll a secret Perception check to [[/act sense-motive]] against them. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to [[/act make-an-impression]] on creatures that value truth and respect the honor of your word.

Special Hryngar culture cares less for honor but teaches to capitalize on its absence. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Deep Space Hryngar] heritage, you instead gain the bonus to Make an Impression on individuals who value crime and deceit.
